name: guardrail-without-hurting
value: Ship if CVR improves without hurting bounce rate.
reason: standard guardrail form must be accepted

name: guardrail-without-compliance-flags
value: Ship if Landing CVR exceeds baseline without compliance flags.
reason: target_report uses 'without compliance flags'; the regex must accept any 'without <guardrail>' clause, not only 'without hurting'

name: guardrail-missing
reason: a decision rule with no 'without <guardrail>' clause must be rejected

name: guardrail-wrong-prefix
value: Launch if CVR improves without hurting bounce.

name: fabrication-warn-as-pass
reason: claiming Pass where the probe found Warn must be flagged

name: fabrication-fail-as-pass
reason: claiming Pass where the probe found Fail must be flagged

name: honest-warn-not-fabrication
reason: under-claiming (Warn where probe Pass) is honest, not fabrication
